tasks.subject: Task 1: 创建工具文案映射配置
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 建立可扩展的工具文案映射系统，支持操作类型和工具名两层映射

**Files:**
- Create: apps/client/src/config/toolLabels.ts
- Create: apps/client/src/config/__tests__/toolLabels.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] 文案映射包含 load_tools、search_tools、invoke_tool 操作类型
- [x] 支持工具名特定文案
- [x] getLabel 函数正确处理三层 fallback
- [x] 100% 覆盖率

**Verify:** pnpm test --testPathPattern="toolLabels.test" -- --coverage

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/config/toolLabels.ts", "apps/client/src/config/__tests__/toolLabels.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test --testPathPattern=\"toolLabels.test\" -- --coverage", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Two-tier mapping system", "Three-level fallback", "100% coverage"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: 创建工具参数配置
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 建立参数摘要配置，支持关键参数选择和截断规则

**Files:**
- Create: apps/client/src/config/toolParamConfig.ts
- Create: apps/client/src/config/__tests__/toolParamConfig.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 参数配置支持关键参数列表和截断规则
- [ ] formatParams 函数正确提取关键参数
- [ ] 超长参数截断并显示 "(N words more)"
- [ ] 100% 覆盖率

**Verify:** pnpm test --testPathPattern="toolParamConfig.test" -- --coverage

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/config/toolParamConfig.ts", "apps/client/src/config/__tests__/toolParamConfig.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test --testPathPattern=\"toolParamConfig.test\" -- --coverage", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Key param extraction", "Truncation logic", "100% coverage"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: 创建 useTrackingFold Hook
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 管理折叠状态，实现自动折叠逻辑

**Files:**
- Create: apps/client/src/hooks/useTrackingFold.ts
- Create: apps/client/src/hooks/__tests__/useTrackingFold.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Hook 跟踪每轮回复的折叠状态
- [ ] 自动折叠上一轮功能
- [ ] 最新一轮永不折叠
- [ ] 100% 覆盖率

**Verify:** pnpm test --testPathPattern="useTrackingFold.test" -- --coverage

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/hooks/useTrackingFold.ts", "apps/client/src/hooks/__tests__/useTrackingFold.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test --testPathPattern=\"useTrackingFold.test\" -- --coverage", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Fold state tracking", "Auto fold logic", "100% coverage"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: 修改 TrackingModal - 自动折叠逻辑

- Modify: apps/client/src/components/channel/TrackingModal.test.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] 最新一轮永不折叠


tasks.subject: Task 9: 处理 Warming up 状态
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 显示 "AI正在warming up..." 状态，第一条回复返回时隐藏

**Files:**
- Modify: apps/client/src/components/channel/TrackingCard.tsx
- Modify: apps/client/src/components/channel/TrackingModal.tsx
- Modify: apps/client/src/components/channel/TrackingCard.test.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Session 初始化时显示 warming up
- [ ] 第一条回复返回时自动隐藏
- [ ] 后续回复不显示 warming up
- [ ] 测试 warming up 生命周期

**Verify:** pnpm test --testPathPattern="TrackingCard.test|TrackingModal.test" -- --coverage

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/components/channel/TrackingCard.tsx", "apps/client/src/components/channel/TrackingModal.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm test --testPathPattern=\"TrackingCard.test\" -- --coverage", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Warming up display", "Auto hide on first reply", "Lifecycle management"]}
```
